name: pstack
description: 5Ps AI Exponential Framework — methodology skill stack.

interface.shortDescription: 5Ps AI Exponential Framework — methodology skill stack for deep work.
interface.longDescription: pstack implements the 5Ps framework (Perceive, Portfolio, Prune, Decide, Perform, Artisan, Progress, Observer) as composable skills. Each P is a phase in AI-orchestrated work — invoke the skill for the phase you're in.
